issues.description: Token 'smite' is ambiguous - could refer to protection prayer, combat spell, or other mechanic. Marked as unresolved appropriately.

notes: Step mapping is accurate. Core requirement (1400 bones for prayer xp cashing) properly identified. Quest prerequisites (CURSE_OF_THE_EMPTY_LORD, VARROCK_HARD) are essential and correctly marked. Abstract items (melee gear, cash stack) are genuine player-level abstractions. Conditional items (red topaz, ring of dueling) appropriately handled. Unresolved 'smite' reference does not impact step accuracy.
